websites.name: ezCalendar
websites.description: An app that uses AI to automatically input dates, time and place to your custom activity calendar — just take a picture of a flyer on the street or paste a link and it does the rest.
websites.target_audience: Social butterflies and people who love going out, aged 18-45, who want to never miss a fun event again
websites.unique_value: Zero manual entry — snap a flyer or drop a link and AI instantly adds the event to your calendar. No other calendar app does this.
websites.cta_goal: create an account and use the app to make your life fun

brand_voice: Fun, energetic, and relatable — like that friend who always knows the best events happening in town and makes sure you never miss out
